notes: Issue #16, investigated by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). NO RECIPE AUTHORED — president.al is BLOCKED by a Cloudflare interactive/managed challenge. Evidence: HTTP 403 with title 'Just a moment...' for BOTH the honest bot UA (5424 bytes) and a browser UA (5552 bytes); /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml and /sitemap_index.xml all return the same 403 challenge page. Escalated to a REAL headless Chromium via Playwright (browser UA, en-US locale, 9s dwell for the JS challenge to run): still 'Just a moment...', only 2 anchors -> STILL CHALLENGED. This is the same taxonomy entry as mng_president and lbn_presidency: it needs a challenge-solving browser (e.g. an undetected/stealth driver or a CAPTCHA-solving service), which the engine deliberately does not ship. Not a selector or user_agent problem — do not retry with a UA override. WAYBACK IS THE VIABLE ROUTE: CDX for president.al/* returns ~4850 statuscode:200 captures spanning 2001-2026, densest 2012-2017 (2012:299, 2013:1025, 2014:967, 2015:947, 2016:689, 2017:667), with WordPress-style date permalinks (/2018/11/..., /2018/05/...). RECOMMEND a follow-up alb_president_wayback.yml; the archived-layout selectors still need to be worked out. country=Albania; source_url=https://president.al/; source_name=president.al; source_type=official_gov; region=Europe; iso3n=8; content_format=fulltext.
